weight-loss.subject: heavier-set Black woman, late 30s, soft round build, hair tied back and frizzing with sweat
weight-loss.scene: pounding hard on a gym treadmill, arms pumping, jowls and belly bouncing with each heavy stride, sweat sheeting down her flushed face under harsh fluorescent light

weight-loss.subject: overweight white man, mid 40s, big belly straining a soaked grey t-shirt, balding and beet-red
weight-loss.scene: jogging up a tree-lined park path at golden dawn, gut bouncing, mouth gaping for air, the whole frame smearing into warm streaks as the camera pans alongside him

weight-loss.subject: out-of-shape Latina woman, early 30s, thick-waisted and curvy, drenched ponytail
weight-loss.scene: doing frantic jumping jacks on a bedroom floor in front of a phone propped against the wall, arms and legs splayed in mid-jump, belly and chest jiggling, dim lamp light

weight-loss.subject: heavy-set South Asian man, late 20s, soft doughy midsection, sweat-plastered hair
weight-loss.scene: hands on his knees gasping at the edge of a spin bike, face contorted and dripping, a single bead of sweat caught falling from his nose, tack-sharp in muted grey gym light

weight-loss.subject: plus-size white woman, 50s, broad and stocky, short grey-streaked hair stuck to her forehead

weight-loss.subject: overweight East Asian man, mid 30s, round belly, soaked navy tank top, towel around neck
weight-loss.scene: climbing concrete stadium stairs two at a time, thighs straining, leaning forward and breathing hard, the steps and railing smearing past as the camera tracks up beside him at dawn

weight-loss.subject: heavier Black man, early 40s, thick build with a soft gut, glistening shaved head
weight-loss.scene: frozen at the bottom of a burpee on a living-room rug, arms shaking under his weight, face an inch from the floor and dripping sweat onto the carpet, tack-sharp in moody low light

weight-loss.subject: out-of-shape white woman, late 20s, soft round build, flushed cheeks and damp bangs
weight-loss.scene: swinging a kettlebell hard in a home garage gym, the bell a blurred streak at the top of the arc, her whole body in the explosive hip drive, sweat flying, muted daylight from an open door

weight-loss.subject: heavy-set Middle Eastern woman, mid 30s, curvy and thick-armed, hijab pushed back from a sweat-soaked hairline
weight-loss.scene: hauling hard on a rowing machine, mouth open mid-pull, the cable and seat smearing along its track as she drives back, harsh gym strip-lighting overhead

weight-loss.subject: overweight Latino man, late 40s, big belly and thick neck, sweat-soaked grey hoodie
weight-loss.scene: jogging hard along a quiet suburban sidewalk at first light, breath fogging, gut bouncing, every part of the frame streaking into a near-abstract earthy smear from the camera pan

weight-loss.subject: plus-size Black woman, early 20s, soft full figure, braids whipping with sweat at the ends
weight-loss.scene: mid-air in a high-knee sprint drill in a bright gym, knee driving up, face screwed in effort, the whole scene dissolving into a bright near-abstract motion smear

weight-loss.subject: heavier white man, mid 50s, large soft belly, red sweaty face and grey stubble
weight-loss.scene: collapsed hands-on-knees beside a treadmill, a towel draped over his neck, chest heaving, sweat dripping from his chin in a tack-sharp frozen moment under soft muted daylight

recovery.subject: mid-30s East Asian man, lean muscular build
recovery.scene: He drives a percussion massage gun deep into his own quad, the attachment visibly compressing the muscle as his hand grips the device, mid-session on a clinic treatment bench under cool overhead light

recovery.subject: late-20s Black woman, athletic build
recovery.scene: She braces a foam roller under her IT band on a studio floor, weight on her forearms, face tensed mid-roll as morning light rakes across the wood

recovery.subject: early-40s white male sports therapist working on a Latina runner in her 30s
recovery.scene: The therapist's thumbs dig into the runner's calf in a deep-tissue stroke, her skin blanching under the pressure, both caught mid-grimace in a dim treatment room

recovery.subject: early-30s South Asian woman, slim flexible build
recovery.scene: She lunges into a deep dynamic hip-flexor stretch arms swinging overhead, her trailing leg and arms smearing into heavy motion blur across a sunlit studio

recovery.subject: mid-30s Black male physiotherapist mobilizing a white male client's shoulder
recovery.scene: The physio cradles and rotates the client's arm through a joint-mobilization arc, both sets of hands locked on the shoulder in a softly-lit grey clinic

recovery.subject: late-20s white man, broad-shouldered build
recovery.scene: He sits zipped into inflated compression recovery boots up to the thighs, hands resting on the air-pumped sleeves as he reclines on a couch in soft afternoon light

recovery.subject: early-30s mixed-race woman, toned build

recovery.subject: mid-40s Middle Eastern man, sturdy build
recovery.scene: He sits on a cedar sauna bench leaning forward elbows on knees, sweat sheeting down his back as warm golden light glows through the slatted wood

recovery.subject: late-20s Black man, very athletic build
recovery.scene: He steps from a steaming hot tub straight toward a cold plunge mid-contrast-therapy, torso and arms blurring into a near-abstract smear of steam and motion

recovery.subject: early-30s white woman, fit build

recovery.subject: mid-30s Latino man, stocky build
recovery.scene: He flows through a deep lunge-to-thoracic-rotation mobility drill, torso twisting and trailing arm sweeping into motion blur across a dawn-lit garage gym

recovery.subject: late-30s Asian woman physiotherapist stretching a Black female athlete in her 20s
recovery.scene: The therapist presses the athlete's extended leg into a deep assisted hamstring stretch, one hand on the heel one on the knee, both focused in a calm grey-lit clinic

longevity.subject: a mid-30s Black couple and their two young kids, all athletic-casual in fleeces and trail shoes
longevity.scene: the family crests a rocky ridgeline trail single-file, the dad turning to grin back as morning sun rakes across the switchback behind them

longevity.subject: a fit Latina mom in her early 40s carrying her giggling 4-year-old son on her shoulders
longevity.scene: she strides fast down a dappled forest path with the toddler's hands gripping her forehead, dust and leaf-light streaking past in the slow-shutter smear

longevity.subject: a white dad in his late 30s and his 8-year-old daughter, both on mountain bikes with knee pads
longevity.scene: they pedal hard along a gravel lakeside track, wheels and spokes dissolving into a horizontal blur as the kid stands on her pedals laughing

longevity.subject: a multi-generational South Asian family — fit grandfather in his 60s, mid-30s parents, two kids
longevity.scene: all five kneel together planting seedlings in a sunny backyard vegetable garden, the grandfather pressing soil firm while a child waters with a tin can

longevity.subject: a young East Asian mother in her early 30s and her barefoot toddler daughter
longevity.scene: they walk hand-in-hand along the wet tideline at dawn, the child mid-stomp in a shallow wave as foam scatters and muted earthy light glows behind them

longevity.subject: a mixed-race family of four in a canoe — dad paddling stern, mom bow, two kids in life vests between

longevity.subject: a Black dad in his late 30s and his two sons crouched at the edge of a calm river
longevity.scene: the older boy snaps his wrist sidearm to skip a flat stone, caught tack-sharp mid-release with the ripple just starting and warm side-light on their faces

longevity.subject: a fit white couple in their 40s chasing their three kids across a green park meadow

longevity.subject: a Middle Eastern mom in her mid-30s and her 6-year-old daughter on a wooded forest path

longevity.subject: a young Filipino dad in his early 30s and his 5-year-old son flying a kite

longevity.subject: a multi-generational Latino family — fit grandmother in her 60s, parents, three kids — at a picnic
longevity.scene: they sit cross-legged on a blanket under a big oak, the grandmother caught mid-laugh passing a bowl of fruit as a kid reaches in, dappled soft daylight

longevity.subject: a white mom in her late 30s and her two daughters walking a misty meadow trail at dawn
longevity.scene: they stroll three-abreast through dew-soaked tall grass, the youngest swinging her mom's arm, muted earthy dawn fog softening the whole frame

performance.subject: Black male sprinter, early 20s, lean explosive build, shaved head

performance.subject: Mixed-race female muay thai fighter, mid-20s, lean conditioned athletic build, wrapped shins

cognitive.subject: White woman, late 60s, silver hair, cardigan

cognitive.subject: Latino man, mid 20s, lean, stubble
